label: Suspicious Bank Email
text:
From: security-alert@chasebank-verify.com
Subject: URGENT: Your Account Has Been Suspended!

Dear Valued Customer,

We have detected unusual activity on your Chase account. Your account has been temporarily suspended for your protection.

You must verify your identity immediately or your account will be permanently closed within 24 hours.

Click here to verify: http://chase-secure-login.totallylegit.xyz/verify?id=8831

Please have your Social Security Number and account credentials ready for verification.

Thank you,
Chase Security Team
This is an automated message. Do not reply.

label: Subtle IT Phishing
text:
From: it-helpdesk@company-portal.net
Subject: Action Required: Password Expiration Notice

Hi,

Your corporate password will expire in 3 days. To avoid disruption to your email and VPN access, please update your password using the link below.

Update Password: https://company-portal.net/password-reset

If you did not request this change, please contact the IT Help Desk at ext. 4400.

Best regards,
IT Support Team

label: Legitimate Notification
text:
From: no-reply@amazon.com
Subject: Your Amazon order #112-4839271-8834 has shipped

Hello,

Your package is on its way! Here are your delivery details:

Order #112-4839271-8834
Estimated delivery: March 10, 2026
Carrier: UPS Ground

You can track your package in the Amazon app or at amazon.com/your-orders.

Thank you for shopping with us.

Amazon.com
